kits.name: Agency Agents
kits.description: The Agency: AI Specialists Ready to Transform Your Workflow
kits.author: msitarzewski

kits.name: akm Plugins
kits.description: Official host-agent plugins for akm — Claude Code skill and dynamic dispatch, OpenCode tool registration, and an AGENTS.md drop-in for Codex/Cursor/Copilot/Qwen.
kits.author: itlackey

kits.name: akm Official Onboarding Kit
kits.description: Use when an agent needs to learn or teach akm itself — ships skills, knowledge, workflows, commands, and a librarian subagent that cover install, search, kit authoring, and publishing against the official registry.

assets.name: akm-quickstart
assets.description: Bootstrap akm in a fresh environment — install CLI, init stash, verify registry.

assets.name: install-akm-kit
assets.description: Install or clone an akm kit from npm, GitHub, git URL, or a local directory.

assets.name: publish-akm-kit
assets.description: Publish a directory of assets as a discoverable akm kit.

assets.name: akm-overview
assets.description: High-level map of stash / source / registry and the nine asset types.

assets.name: akm-kit-structure
assets.description: Canonical kit directory layout and asset frontmatter templates.

assets.name: akm-registry-schema
assets.description: Registry index.json schema and manual-entry format.

assets.name: publish-kit
assets.description: End-to-end workflow to publish and verify a new akm kit.

assets.name: onboard-agent
assets.description: Bootstrap a coding agent so it can discover, install, and run akm assets.

assets.name: akm-find
assets.description: Prompt template to produce a ranked shortlist of akm assets for a stated need.

assets.name: akm-review-kit
assets.description: Prompt template to evaluate a candidate akm kit before install.

assets.name: akm-librarian
assets.description: Read-only subagent that finds and recommends akm assets for a task.

kits.author: itlackey

kits.name: Claude Plugins Official
